title: AI Crypto SYN Sinks 30%, Leaving Arthur Hayes With $1.41M Paper Loss
excerpt: SYN crashed 30% to $0.1281, leaving Arthur Hayes with an estimated $1.41 million paper loss as charts hint at a possible relief rally.
content_html:
SYN, the native token of the AI crypto project Synapse, suffered a brutal crash on Thursday, leaving BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes with an estimated $1.41 million paper loss on his reported investment.

SYN Price Plunges 30% in Sudden Sell-Off

SYN plunged by as much as 30% on Thursday, falling to an intraday low of $0.1281.

The decline extended the token's sharp reversal from its late-June peak near $0.725, erasing most of the gains recorded after Hayes publicly backed the Synapse project.

SYN's latest decline also pushed the token substantially below Hayes' estimated entry price.

Hayes reportedly acquired 6.16 million SYN tokens for approximately $2.2 million through Flowdesk, implying an average purchase price near $0.357.

At Thursday's low of $0.1281, the position was worth roughly $789,000. That translates into an estimated unrealized loss of about $1.41 million, or approximately 64% of the initial investment.

The calculation assumes the Hayes-linked wallet still holds the entire 6.16 million SYN position. It also excludes transaction fees, subsequent transfers, additional purchases, or any undisclosed hedging activity.

Hayes' involvement may offer limited reassurance to traders. His recent sales of Hyperliquid (HYPE), Near (NEAR), Zcash (ZEC), and Worldcoin (WLD) shortly after publicly backing these tokens prompted accusations that he had used followers as exit liquidity, damaging trust in his subsequent endorsements.

SYN Relief Rally Could Target $0.176

Despite the bearish structure, SYN may be due for a short-term relief rally after its latest collapse.

The token remains inside a descending parallel channel on the four-hour chart, with Thursday's sell-off briefly pushing the price toward the structure's lower boundary. SYN's relative strength index also fell to around 26, placing it below the oversold threshold of 30.

Similar declines of more than 20% during SYN's recent downtrend were followed by immediate rebound attempts as short sellers booked profits and speculative buyers entered near local lows.

A comparable bounce could initially send SYN toward the 0.786 Fibonacci retracement level near $0.1767. That area overlaps with the channel's upper trendline, making the $0.176–$0.18 range a likely resistance zone.

Conversely, a breakdown below Thursday's $0.1281 low would weaken the rebound scenario and keep the broader downtrend intact.

SYN remains below its 50- (green), 100- (blue) and 200-period (blue) exponential moving averages (EMAs), while the descending channel continues to reflect lower highs and lower lows.

content_html_zh:
SYN 是人工智能加密项目 Synapse 的原生代币，周四遭遇严重崩盘，导致 BitMEX 联合创始人 Arthur Hayes 报告的投资账面损失估计为 141 万美元。

SYN 价格因突然抛售暴跌 30%

SYN 周四暴跌 30%，跌至盘中低点 0.1281 美元。

此次下跌延续了该代币从 6 月下旬接近 0.725 美元的峰值大幅逆转的趋势，抹去了 Hayes 公开支持 Synapse 项目后录得的大部分涨幅。

SYN 的最新下跌也使该代币大幅低于 Hayes 的预计入场价格。

据报道，Hayes 通过 Flowdesk 以约 220 万美元的价格收购了 616 万个 SYN 代币，这意味着平均购买价格接近 0.357 美元。

在周四低点 0.1281 美元时，该头寸价值约为 789,000 美元。 这意味着预计未实现损失约为 141 万美元，约占初始投资的 64%。

该计算假设与 Hayes 关联的钱包仍然持有全部 616 万个 SYN 头寸。 它还不包括交易费用、后续转账、额外购买或任何未披露的对冲活动。

海耶斯的参与可能会给交易者带来有限的保证。 他最近在公开支持 Hyperliquid (HYPE)、Near (NEAR)、Zcash (ZEC) 和 Worldcoin (WLD) 后不久就出售了这些代币，这引发了他利用追随者作为退出流动性的指控，损害了人们对他后续支持的信任。

SYN 救济集会目标可能为 0.176 美元

尽管结构看跌，但 SYN 在最近一次暴跌后可能会出现短期缓解反弹。

该代币仍位于四小时图表上的下降平行通道内，周四的抛售短暂地将价格推向该结构的下限。 SYN的相对强弱指数也跌至26左右，低于30的超卖阈值。

在 SYN 最近的下跌趋势中，类似的跌幅超过 20%，随后由于卖空者获利了结而投机性买家进入接近局部低点，因此立即尝试反弹。

类似的反弹最初可能会将 SYN 推向 0.786 斐波那契回撤位，接近 0.1767 美元。 该区域与通道的上部趋势线重叠，使得 0.176 美元至 0.18 美元的范围成为可能的阻力区。

相反，跌破周四 0.1281 美元的低点将削弱反弹前景，并保持更广泛的下行趋势不变。

SYN 仍低于 50 周期（绿色）、100 周期（蓝色）和 200 周期（蓝色）指数移动平均线 (EMA)，而下降通道继续反映较低的高点和较低的低点。
